title: Comprehensive E2E Distributed Transaction Chaos Experiment
description: Ultimate end-to-end chaos engineering experiment combining all scenarios from production-scale and extensive-postgres experiments. Tests distributed transactions across 17 hops with 5 minutes of continuous transaction load while executing comprehensive chaos scenarios: PostgreSQL (Cache Miss, Vacuum Starvation, Temp Spill, Lock Storm, Pool Exhaustion, Query Saturation, Slow Transactions), MySQL, MongoDB, Redis, Kafka, RabbitMQ, ActiveMQ, Infrastructure (CPU/Memory/Network stress), and Disaster Recovery (Primary Failover, DR Site Failover). All scenarios run concurrently with continuous transaction load for maximum realism.

steady-state-hypothesis.title: All systems are healthy and accessible across primary and DR sites

method._comment_phase: === PHASE 1: BASELINE - Establish baseline with load generator starting ===
method.name: baseline-distributed-transaction-flow

method._comment_phase: === PHASE 2: POSTGRESQL CHAOS SCENARIOS (During 5-minute transaction load) ===
method.name: SCENARIO-1-PostgreSQL-Cache-Miss-Storm
